markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Parloa's CMS workflow for GrowthX's content publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow:** GrowthX will stage content in Storyblok; Parloa will review and publish.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Schema Markup:** A critical SEO feature for LLM visibility is missing. Parloa will investigate adding it.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Imagery:** GrowthX's AI-generated images were rejected. Parloa will provide a new batch by EOW to meet the project's high design standards.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [**Authors:** Dora is creating a new author strategy (e.g., assigning authors to content clusters) to improve credibility and rotation.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

## Topics

### CMS Publishing Workflow

  - [**Goal:** GrowthX stages content in Storyblok for Parloa to review and publish, streamlining the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
    1.  [**Locate Content:** Navigate to `Content` → `EN` or `DE` → `blog`.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
    2.  [**Create Post:** Clone an existing post to preserve the template.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
    3.  **Populate Fields:**
          - [**Topics:** Select from existing tags.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
          - [**Author:** Select from the dropdown.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
          - [**Image:** Upload the main blog image.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
          - [**Excerpt:** Write a short summary.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
    4.  **Format Content:**
          - [Use the rich text editor for the main body.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
          - [**Critical:** Use `H2` tags for section headers to auto-generate the on-page table of contents.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
    5.  **Add SEO & CTAs:**
          - [**SEO Section:** Add meta title/description and link to the corresponding translated post.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
          - [**CTAs:** Use the `form section` or `button` components to add interactive elements.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**Status Indicators:**](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Green:** Published](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Half-green:** Saved but not published](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

### Schema Markup Gap

  - [**Problem:** The CMS lacks a field for schema markup.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This is a key SEO feature for improving content visibility and citation by large language models (LLMs).](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Solution:** Parloa will ask its web developer about the feasibility and effort required to add this field.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### Blog Imagery

  - [**Problem:** GrowthX's AI-generated image examples were rejected for not meeting Parloa's high design standards.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Storyblok uses the main blog image as the social media thumbnail; a separate thumbnail cannot be set.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Solution:** Parloa will provide a new batch of approved images by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Author Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current author list in Storyblok is outdated and lacks a clear strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a new author strategy to improve content credibility and rotate authorship.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Potential Model:** Assign specific authors (e.g., Head of Product Paul for technical topics) to content clusters defined in the SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Parloa:**](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Ask the web developer about adding a schema markup field to Storyblok.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Provide a new batch of approved blog images to GrowthX by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [Share the new author strategy with GrowthX once finalized.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
      - [Use the approved images and author strategy when staging content in Storyblok.](https://fathom.video/share/u1j-57daGKs2mDL-fuzuD78_fmGBj3QM?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
